_comment: Lighthouse-CI config (D-12 / LAUNCH-02, plan 23-04). The four ci.collect.url values MIRROR scripts/seed/demo-usernames.ts (DEMO_USERNAMES: minimal=devon-park, editorial=lena-voss, edgerunner-v2=jadrianports, aurora=aurora-demo) and MUST be kept in sync with that single-source constant — a username change is one edit there + here. JSON has no comments, so this _comment key documents the coupling. These are already-live prod pages (deploy-gated): NO startServerCommand. ci.assert.assertions['categories:performance'] IS the perf gate — a sub-0.90 mobile run exits non-zero. Run: npm run lighthouse (lhci autorun); output to .lighthouseci (gitignored, plan 23-02). The live green numbers are recorded in the phase HUMAN-UAT, not this plan.
